/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/gcs_planner.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gcs_planner.dir/src/gcs_planner_pointrobot.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gcs_planner.dir/src/free_space_cdt.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gcs_planner.dir/src/gcs_planner_robotarm.cpp.o -o gcs_planner  -Wl,-rpath,/home/trevor-stack/drake-install/lib /home/trevor-stack/drake-install//lib/libdrake.so /home/trevor-stack/drake-install//lib/libdrake_marker.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libspdlog.so.1.12.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libfmt.so.9.1.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libgmpxx.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libmpfr.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libgmp.so
